chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Prohibition of Hunting in the Sanctuary and Its Rulings

text: 2378 - وَ رَوَى عَبْدُ اَلرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ اَلْحَجَّاجِ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «فِي قِيمَةِ اَلْحَمَامَةِ دِرْهَمٌ وَ فِي اَلْفَرْخِ نِصْفُ دِرْهَمٍ وَ فِي اَلْبَيْضَةِ رُبُعُ دِرْهَمٍ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2378 - Abdul Rahman ibn Al-Hajjaj narrated that Abu Abdullah (as) said:
"The value of a pigeon is one dirham, the value of a chick is half a dirham, and the value of an egg is a quarter of a dirham."
